name: accounting firms managing 5–15 clients tool
description: For accounting firms managing 5–15 clients, inefficient tracking of depreciation causes late tax filings. We provide a fixed asset management system instead of manual spreadsheets and outdated accounting software.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking depreciation schedules and generating timely tax reports.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in tracking depreciation schedules and generating timely tax reports.
